failedAssertions.reason: No polling or WebSocket mechanism in DashboardApprovalPage; dashboard does not auto-refresh when transactions change in other modules
Mobile viewport: summary cards use grid-cols-2 without grid-cols-1 for smallest screens, failing to stack vertically
loadPendingApprovals and loadCounts catch errors and only console.error(); no user-facing retry button, friendly message, or per-module failure indicator

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Basic keyboard navigation verified, but comprehensive WCAG AA audit requires Lighthouse or axe-core not available in current toolset

appliedUpdates.description: Fixed PA2 duplicate bug in loadPendingApprovals: PA2 data is now only fetched separately when statusFilter is 'all', preventing duplicates when PA2 is explicitly selected
Added onNavigateToKas, onNavigateToBank, onNavigateToGudang props to DashboardApprovalPage instances to enable module badge navigation
Confirmed that sql.js databases are loaded into memory at Electron startup; any seeded data requires app restart to be visible in dashboard
Seeded 40 Kas transactions for performance/overdue testing
Seeded 40 Bank transactions for performance/overdue testing
Seeded 40 Gudang transactions (15 with 48h-old timestamps) for performance/overdue testing
Updated assertion statuses: VAL-DASH-011 and VAL-DASH-012 moved to passed after data seeding and successful testing
